risk_factors.factor: high number of incidents at the same location
same time of day for incidents

recommendations.action: Increase staff supervision during high-risk hours
recommendations.rationale: Most incidents occur around 2 PM and 5 PM when staff presence may be lacking.

recommendations.action: Implement fall prevention training for staff
recommendations.rationale: Falls are occurring and pose critical risk, training could mitigate this risk.

recommendations.action: Conduct safety audits of Wocanda and Noida
recommendations.rationale: These locations have reported the most incidents and require further analysis to identify hazards.

common_patterns: Repeated incidents in Wocanda signal ongoing risk.
Specific times like 2 PM and 5 PM are critical for safety measures.
Understanding client behaviors may reveal underlying causes for incidents.
pattern_analysis.temporal_patterns: Incidents occur predominantly during the afternoon, especially around 2 PM and 5 PM, with a notable frequency on Wednesdays and Fridays.
